name: How much is my broken leg from crane malfunction worth in Utah?

mainEntity.name: How much is my broken leg from crane malfunction worth in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.description: **$50k-$250k+ settlements common depending on surgery, lost wages, permanency; third-party boosts value.** No formula[3]. **Key factors:** 1. Medical costs total. 2. Wage loss x duration. 3. Pain multiplier. 4. Fault share. Track bills/losses. Lawyer values using comps/experts.
